name: RMW - MP7
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - A cool modern smg with an integrated recoil compensator inside the main body of the weapon that basically "hammers down" the recoil. Chambered in .45 ACP. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
